data.title: Oracle Names New CFO Amid Massive AI Cloud Buildout
data.description: Oracle has appointed a utility CFO to manage its finances amidst significant investments in new data centers amounting to hundreds of billions of dollars. This move comes as the company is undergoing a substantial AI cloud expansion.
Japan’s PM said she isn’t thinking about requesting energy-saving measures that could put a brake on economic activity.
Israeli sources tell CNN that authorities have prepared contingency measures should talks with Iran collapse.
President Trump is threatening Iran with an assault that some experts in the laws of war say would be illegal-WSJ

data.title: HII Teams with GrayMatter Robotics to Integrate Physical AI into Manned and Unmanned Shipbuilding
data.description: In Carson, California, on April 6, 2026, a memorandum of understanding (MOU) was signed between HII (NYSE: HII) and GrayMatter Robotics (GMR). The agreement aims to explore integrating GMR’s Physical AI technologies into shipbuilding operations to enhance efficiency. This collaboration could potentially accelerate throughput, fortify the maritime industrial sector, and supplement the shipbuilding workforce. The focus will be on introducing autonomous technologies for surface preparation, coating, and inspection in shipbuilding processes. The MOU was signed at GrayMatter Robotics’ headquarters and was attended by Eric Chewning, HII’s executive vice president of maritime systems and corporate strategy, and Ariyan Kabir, GrayMatter Robotics CEO and co-founder.
